title: Xanthy Roasted Ukrainian Beets Roast
description: A cozy Ukrainian dish featuring roasted beets with a hint of dark brown soft sugar, perfect for a light and comforting meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, dark brown soft sugar, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped beets to the bowl and toss to coat with the sugar and spice mixture.
Spread the beets out in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the beets in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until they are tender and caramelized.
Remove the beets from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh dill.
Drizzle the beets with lemon juice and toss to coat.
Serve the beets hot, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
